note: Generated by scripts/eliza1/generate-canonical-planner-fixtures.ts — do not edit by hand. Each case ships a small action registry whose entries are real canonical action names from runtime plugins (SHELL, FILE, TODO, etc.), not the synthetic SEND_EMAIL/CREATE_REMINDER probes used by planner.json. expected_action_name + expected_params are best-effort labels used for label_match scoring; treat label_match as a comparison signal between modes, not an absolute correctness rate.
derivedFrom: scripts/eliza1/generate-canonical-planner-fixtures.ts (canonical action descriptors lifted from plugin source files)

availableActions.name: BROWSER
availableActions.description: Browser tab/page control: open/navigate/click/type/screenshot/state; action autofill_login + domain autofill vault-gated credential into workspace tab.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Browser action to perform.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL for open or navigate.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: Selector for click, type, or wait.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text for type.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Keyboard key for press.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Required when action is autofill_login: registrable hostname (e.g. github.com).

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: When using autofill-login: specific saved login; omit for most recently modified.

parameters.name: submit
parameters.description: When using autofill-login: submit the form after filling (default false).

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: MCP operation: call_tool | read_resource | search_actions | list_connections

parameters.name: serverName
parameters.description: Optional MCP server name that owns the tool or resource.

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: For action=call_tool: optional exact MCP tool name to call.

parameters.name: uri
parameters.description: For action=read_resource: exact MCP resource URI to read.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Natural-language description of the tool call or resource to select; for action=search_actions, the keyword query.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: For action=search_actions: filter results to a single connected platform.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: For action=search_actions: maximum results to return.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: For action=search_actions: skip first N results for pagination.

cases.notes: Vault-gated autofill — BROWSER action=autofill_login + domain.

availableActions.name: VISION
availableActions.description: Vision: describe / capture / set_mode / name_entity / identify_person / track_entity.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Operation to perform: describe, capture, set_mode, name_entity, identify_person, or track_entity.

parameters.name: detailLevel
parameters.description: For action=describe: 'summary' to omit object/person breakdowns, 'detailed' for the full breakdown.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: For action=set_mode: vision mode to set: off, camera, screen, or both.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: For action=name_entity: the name to assign to the most relevant visible person or object.

parameters.name: targetHint
parameters.description: For action=name_entity or action=identify_person: optional phrase describing which visible entity to focus on.

parameters.name: includeUnknown
parameters.description: For action=identify_person: whether to mention unidentified people in the response.

cases.notes: Discriminates BROWSER screenshot from VISION capture.

availableActions.name: FILE
availableActions.description: File operations umbrella: action=read/write/edit/grep/glob/ls, optional target=device.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: File operation to run.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Optional target filesystem. Use device for relative paths under the device filesystem bridge; omit for workspace files.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path for read/write/edit operations.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute file or directory path for grep/glob/ls. Defaults to the session cwd where supported.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Full file contents for action=write.

parameters.name: old_string
parameters.description: Exact substring to replace for action=edit.

parameters.name: new_string
parameters.description: Replacement substring for action=edit.

parameters.name: replace_all
parameters.description: For action=edit, replace every occurrence instead of requiring one match.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Regex for action=grep or glob pattern for action=glob.

availableActions.name: SHELL
availableActions.description: Run shell commands or manage shell command history.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Shell operation: run | clear_history | view_history.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Shell command to run for action=run; executed via /bin/bash -c <command>.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Five to ten word humanly-readable summary of the command.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Hard timeout in ms; clamped to [100, 600000]. Default 120000.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Absolute working directory; must not resolve under a blocked path. Defaults to the session cwd.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: For action=view_history: maximum number of recorded commands to return.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

cases.notes: Near-miss vs SHELL: code search routes through FILE action=grep.

cases.input: resume the form I had open before

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Form verb: restore. Defaults to restore when omitted.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Optional stashed form session id to restore.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: write, create, update, complete, cancel, delete, list, clear.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Todo id (update/complete/cancel/delete).

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Imperative form, e.g. 'Add tests' (create/update).

parameters.name: activeForm
parameters.description: Present-continuous form, e.g. 'Adding tests' (create/update).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: pending | in_progress | completed | cancelled.

parameters.name: parentTodoId
parameters.description: Parent todo id for sub-tasks (create/update).

parameters.name: includeCompleted
parameters.description: Include completed/cancelled todos in action=list output.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max rows to return for action=list.

cases.notes: Stashed-form rehydration intent — FORM action=restore.

cases.input: did the user's payment for the reading come through yet?

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Operation: check or request.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: For request — payment amount as a string (e.g. '3.00').

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: For check — optional entity id whose active reading payment should be checked. Defaults to the current sender.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: For check — optional room id whose active reading payment should be checked. Defaults to the current room.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

availableActions.name: WALLET
availableActions.description: WALLET umbrella: action=transfer|swap|bridge|gov (chain ops) | token_info (market data) | search_address (Birdeye portfolio).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Wallet operation to perform. Write ops use the chain handler registry; analytics ops use the token-info provider registry.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Chain id/name for write ops (source chain for bridge); analytics provider for token_info.

parameters.name: toChain
parameters.description: Destination chain for bridge.

parameters.name: fromToken
parameters.description: Source token symbol, native token alias, or token address.

parameters.name: toToken
parameters.description: Destination token symbol, native token alias, or token address.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Human-readable token amount. Required for transfer, swap, and bridge.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Recipient address for transfer.

parameters.name: slippageBps
parameters.description: Maximum swap slippage in basis points.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Prepare without submitting, or execute the operation.

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Return metadata without signing or sending.

cases.notes: Status check — must pick PAYMENT action=check, not WALLET search_address.

cases.input: ask the seeker for $3.00 to start a Celtic Cross reading

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Operation: check or request.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: For request — payment amount as a string (e.g. '3.00').

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: For check — optional entity id whose active reading payment should be checked. Defaults to the current sender.

parameters.name: roomId
parameters.description: For check — optional room id whose active reading payment should be checked. Defaults to the current room.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

availableActions.name: SHELL
availableActions.description: Run shell commands or manage shell command history.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Shell operation: run | clear_history | view_history.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Shell command to run for action=run; executed via /bin/bash -c <command>.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Five to ten word humanly-readable summary of the command.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Hard timeout in ms; clamped to [100, 600000]. Default 120000.

parameters.name: cwd
parameters.description: Absolute working directory; must not resolve under a blocked path. Defaults to the session cwd.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: For action=view_history: maximum number of recorded commands to return.

availableActions.name: FILE
availableActions.description: File operations umbrella: action=read/write/edit/grep/glob/ls, optional target=device.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: File operation to run.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Optional target filesystem. Use device for relative paths under the device filesystem bridge; omit for workspace files.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path for read/write/edit operations.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute file or directory path for grep/glob/ls. Defaults to the session cwd where supported.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Full file contents for action=write.

parameters.name: old_string
parameters.description: Exact substring to replace for action=edit.

parameters.name: new_string
parameters.description: Replacement substring for action=edit.

parameters.name: replace_all
parameters.description: For action=edit, replace every occurrence instead of requiring one match.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Regex for action=grep or glob pattern for action=glob.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

cases.notes: Direct shell command — SHELL action=run.

cases.input: show me the last few shell commands you ran in this conversation

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action: write, create, update, complete, cancel, delete, list, clear.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Todo id (update/complete/cancel/delete).

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Imperative form, e.g. 'Add tests' (create/update).

parameters.name: activeForm
parameters.description: Present-continuous form, e.g. 'Adding tests' (create/update).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: pending | in_progress | completed | cancelled.

parameters.name: parentTodoId
parameters.description: Parent todo id for sub-tasks (create/update).

parameters.name: includeCompleted
parameters.description: Include completed/cancelled todos in action=list output.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max rows to return for action=list.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

cases.notes: Targeted complete — discriminates from delete/cancel.

availableActions.name: VISION
availableActions.description: Vision: describe / capture / set_mode / name_entity / identify_person / track_entity.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Operation to perform: describe, capture, set_mode, name_entity, identify_person, or track_entity.

parameters.name: detailLevel
parameters.description: For action=describe: 'summary' to omit object/person breakdowns, 'detailed' for the full breakdown.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: For action=set_mode: vision mode to set: off, camera, screen, or both.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: For action=name_entity: the name to assign to the most relevant visible person or object.

parameters.name: targetHint
parameters.description: For action=name_entity or action=identify_person: optional phrase describing which visible entity to focus on.

parameters.name: includeUnknown
parameters.description: For action=identify_person: whether to mention unidentified people in the response.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The user-visible message text.

availableActions.name: BROWSER
availableActions.description: Browser tab/page control: open/navigate/click/type/screenshot/state; action autofill_login + domain autofill vault-gated credential into workspace tab.

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Browser action to perform.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL for open or navigate.

parameters.name: selector
parameters.description: Selector for click, type, or wait.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Text for type.

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Keyboard key for press.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Required when action is autofill_login: registrable hostname (e.g. github.com).

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: When using autofill-login: specific saved login; omit for most recently modified.

parameters.name: submit
parameters.description: When using autofill-login: submit the form after filling (default false).

cases.notes: Camera scene description — VISION action=describe.
